content.en:
A few days later.

Ye Tian took out the Emperor Pulp Order and prepared to enter the Emperor Pulp Realm.

He had already refined the Emperor Pulp Order, poured the power of the True Ancestor into it, and then urged the Emperor Pulp Order.

Rumble!!!!

The Emperor's Pulp Order erupted with brilliant light, communicating a world in the underworld.

The world seems so far away, yet it's so close.

"Get in!"

Ye Tian's body was wrapped in the Emperor Pulp Order and entered the Emperor Pulp Realm.

Emperor Pulp World.

Ye Tian descended here and saw the endless ocean of Emperor Slurry, but he also saw countless void cracks all over the Emperor Slurry Realm, and the chaotic rules were all over here.

Obviously, the Domain Realm was shattered, and even the Emperor Pulp Realm was seriously affected.

Whoa!!

One after another, the divine consciousness suddenly crossed over and found Ye Tian.

Ye Tian also sensed the power of these unfamiliar divine senses, obviously he was not the only one in the Emperor Pulp Realm, there were at least ten or more True Ancestors.

It is very normal for other True Ancestors to have here, after all, under normal circumstances, the Emperor Pulp Realm allows a person to cultivate for millions of years, but he cannot use the law of time, the rules here are very special, completely shielding other rules from the outside world.

Of course, even if you don't use time to speed up, your cultivation speed is far beyond that of the outside world.

Every drop of Emperor Slurry here is a supreme treasure in the outside world, but unfortunately it can't be taken out, once it is taken out, the energy contained in the Emperor Slurry will dissipate and become an ordinary liquid substance.

Ye Tian ignored these true ancestors, those true ancestors sensed Ye Tian, and they didn't come to look for trouble, everyone in the emperor pulp realm seized the time to practice, enjoying the fun and excitement of quickly improving their cultivation, where would they go to find trouble with other true ancestors, unless two true ancestors with a great enmity of life and death met, they would do something to each other.

Otherwise, in general, no one deliberately finds fault.

Moreover, the true ancestors who can get the Emperor's Pulp Order are not simple, they are basically the true ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Forces, once they are offended, it will not be of any benefit to themselves.

Ye Tian found an area at random, released the portable palace, and began to retreat and practice, absorbing a large amount of emperor slurry, and improving the power of the true ancestor after refining.

In the process of refining the Emperor Slurry, Ye Tian discovered that the Emperor Slurry was actually a kind of origin energy, but it was forcibly condensed into the Emperor Slurry by the Domain Ancestor and stored in the Emperor Pulp Realm.

And the rules of the Emperor Pulp Realm are also slowly refining the energy of the outside world and transforming it into Emperor Slurry.

So theoretically speaking, the emperor slurry in the emperor pulp world can never be exhausted.

But this kind of method is not something that Dao Ancestor can do, only Yu Ancestor can have such an amazing method.

It is conceivable how simple it is for the legendary-level forces to cultivate the True Ancestor, and it is estimated that any legendary-level force has a large number of supreme true ancestors and invincible true ancestors.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian had been cultivating in the Emperor Pulp Realm.

Of course, he also made arrangements for the Terrans, and gave a lot of resources to ask several generals from Black Wind Mountain to take care of the Terrans.

If the Terrans were not in danger, those generals would not have to take action.

But once the Supreme True Ancestor attacked the Terrans, those generals would take action.

This is a private act, which does not involve the Black Wind Mountain, and is therefore allowed.

If someone spends a lot of money to protect a small force for a while, he will do it!

It was precisely because there was no danger to the human race that he would enter the Emperor Slurry to practice with confidence.

He felt that he had returned from the Emperor Pulp Realm this time, and his strength might really be expected to step into the ranks of the Invincible True Ancestor, although it was not the Invincible True Ancestor of the Blood Demon General, but it was definitely not weaker than the ordinary Invincible True Ancestor.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian's True Ancestor power was rapidly improving, his physical strength was also rapidly improving, and his overall strength was steadily and rapidly improving.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation had already been promoted from the middle stage of the Great Dao to the peak realm of the late stage of the Great Dao, and it was not very far from the Great Dao Consummation Realm.

"The cultivation of the True Ancestor level is really too difficult, no wonder many True Ancestors have cultivated for many cosmic epochs, and there is no way to raise their cultivation to the Great Dao Perfection Realm, fortunately, I have entered the Emperor Pulp Realm this time, otherwise if I want to improve my cultivation to this realm, I am afraid it will take many hundreds of millions of years of cultivation!" Ye Tian sighed.

In addition to cultivating to the peak realm of the late stage of the Great Dao, Ye Tian's forbidden body has also grown, and he has now refined his forbidden body to the level of two into five.

There is no way, after the forbidden body reaches twenty percent, it will take a long time to refine a small step.

The second is the selfless vacuum, the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear and the Tiangang Extreme Speed, the three major Thousand Dao Techniques, which have also reached the Xiaocheng realm, and as for the Great Wilderness Law Body, they have reached the peak realm of Xiaocheng, which is only one step away from the Dacheng realm, but this step is difficult to cross the past.

"According to my estimates, my current combat power has reached the ranks of Invincible True Ancestors, if the Invincible True Ancestors are divided into three levels: ordinary, elite, and top, I am afraid that I am an ordinary top True Ancestor, and the Blood Demon General can be divided into the top Invincible True Ancestor, which can be called the truly invincible kind!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With so much improvement in strength, Ye Tian is already very satisfied.

Soon, the time was up.

Ye Tian was expelled from the Emperor Pulp Realm and returned to the Terran territory.

After coming back, Ye Tian learned about the situation of the human race.

At present, the human race has given birth to some true ancestors, Xiao Yue and Ye Yu have also stepped into the ranks of half-step true ancestors, and the Nine Extremes Legion under Ye Tian has also made great progress, giving birth to six true ancestors.

In other words, Ye Tian now has six True Ancestors under his command.

These legions under their command are all very loyal to Ye Tianke, and all of them are geniuses who have made a natal oath, otherwise Ye Tian would not have vigorously cultivated.

With these True Monarchs, Ye Tian can hand over many small things to them to do, and he doesn't have to worry about it himself.

In addition, Ye Tian also learned that Ouyang Jiu'er had also stepped into the ranks of True Ancestors, and the speed of his cultivation shocked many human geniuses.

At the beginning, Xiao Yue was the top True Monarch, and Ouyang Jiu'er was the True Monarch in the early stage of the True Spirit.

Now, Xiao Yue is a half-step true ancestor, but Ouyang Jiu'er is already a true ancestor.

Xiao Yue's talent is now a top genius in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and Ouyang Jiu'er's growth speed is simply too demonic, even more terrifying than Ye Tian at the beginning.

Others were very puzzled and curious, but Ye Tian felt that it was very normal.

After all, this is the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, and in the case of sufficient resources, how can progress not be fast!

However, after Ouyang Jiu'er became a true ancestor, he still did not leave the human race, and seemed to regard the human race as his home.

In this regard, Ye Tian did not urge the other party to leave.

this day.

The Void Heaven True Kingdom told Ye Tian something that made Ye Tian feel the signs of the coming storm.

"The five transcendent forces are about to attack the domain forces!"

Ye Tian was surprised, they were too bold.

Of course, they didn't dare to attack the Triple Heaven Force, that was purely death, and the object of their attack was the Triple Heaven Force's Heaven Splitting Sect.

The Triple Heaven forces in the domain realm were almost all wiped out, and only a few Triple Heaven forces survived, but those few Triple Heaven forces basically had backers, otherwise they would not have survived.

The Triple Heaven Force of the Heaven Splitting Sect was almost broken through the Mountain Gate by many True Monarchs at the beginning, but this Triple Heaven Force was not weak at all, the True Ancestor's background was not weaker than the ordinary Quadruple Heaven Force, and the backer behind them was the Fifth Heaven Force-Zhan Tian Sect!

It was not difficult for the five transcendent forces to destroy the Heaven Splitting Sect, under the pretext that the True Ancestors of the Heaven Splitting Sect were forcibly born and killed too many True Monarchs and geniuses.

Therefore, the five transcendent forces took revenge on the Heaven Splitting Sect on the pretext of revenge.

This is a superficial excuse, the real purpose is to lure out the Zhan Tian Sect, so as to attack the Zhan Tian Sect, destroy the Zhan Tian Sect, and seek their resources and treasures.

This move was very risky, and it was easy to touch the nerves of other domain forces, but the strength of the Dao Mountain Realm had to do so.

If it can't develop rapidly, after the promotion of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm in the future, the Dao Ancestors will awaken and be born, and the Dao Mountain Realm will be finished.

Therefore, the Dao Ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm wanted to use the resources and inheritance of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to grow up quickly, so as to give birth to the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors and even the Six Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

The Zhan Tian Sect only has one Five-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and in the future, the Dao Ancestors of the Zhan Tian Sect will be born, and the five transcendent forces will not be afraid.

So, they chose Zhan Tianzong!
